name: zetesis-website
description: Minimal, academic-styled website for Zetesis Labs.

scripts.build: npm run build:css && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist dist/.well-known && cp index.html lab.html output.css CNAME ping.html robots.txt sitemap.xml llms.txt llms-full.txt ai.txt humans.txt 9b9e2a83c35fb9e6e7a601e0acb2510e.txt googlea48e04b5a4f46a18.html dist/ && cp .well-known/security.txt dist/.well-known/ && touch dist/.nojekyll && cp -r public dist/ && npm run prerender:github
scripts.deploy: git push live main && npm run indexnow
